name: Pastitso (Greek Pasta Supreme)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Macaroni (2 cups raw), cook and drain
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt 1 oz of butter in a large skillet and sauté onion until soft and transparent.
3. Add the meat, cooking until browned.
4. Mix tomato paste with wine and add to meat. Continue cooking, adding nutmeg, salt, pepper, and cinnamon. Cook about 15 minutes, then remove from heat, cool, and mix in half the breadcrumbs and half the grated cheese. Set aside. Do not allow meat to bulk; keep it separated.
5. Cook the macaroni in boiling water with oil until soft. Drain and set aside.
6. Make crema by stirring in 1/4 cup cheese.
7. Assemble: Grease a baking dish (like a lasagna pan) and sprinkle with breadcrumbs. Spread half the cooked pasta over the bottom of the dish and sprinkle with 1/4 cup reserved cheese. Spread all of the meat over the pasta. Pour half the sauce over the meat and spread the rest of the pasta over it. Sprinkle with 2 TBSP of cheese. Pour the remaining sauce on top and smooth with a spatula. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese and breadcrumbs.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 50-60 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting into squares. Serve with Greek salad and lots of chilled retsina wine.
